inputs.label: Refractive Index of Medium 1
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the first medium (e.g., air = 1.0003)

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the first medium (e.g., air = 1.0003)
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des ersten Mediums (z. B. Luft = 1,0003)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du premier milieu (ex. air = 1,0003)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción del primer medio (ej., aire = 1.0003)

inputs.label: Angle of Incidence
inputs.businessContext: Angle between incident ray and normal in medium 1

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between incident ray and normal in medium 1
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen ışın ile normal arasındaki açı (ortam 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen einfallendem Strahl und Lot in Medium 1
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre le rayon incident et la normale dans le milieu 1
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre el rayo incidente y la normal en el medio 1
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين الشعاع الساقط والعمودي في الوسط 1

inputs.label: Refractive Index of Medium 2
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the second medium (e.g., glass = 1.5)

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the second medium (e.g., glass = 1.5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des zweiten Mediums (z. B. Glas = 1,5)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du second milieu (ex. verre = 1,5)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción del segundo medio (ej., vidrio = 1.5)

inputs.label: Angle of Refraction
inputs.businessContext: Angle between refracted ray and normal in medium 2 (calculated if unknown)

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between refracted ray and normal in medium 2 (calculated if unknown)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kırılan ışın ile normal arasındaki açı (ortam 2) (bilinmiyorsa hesaplanır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen gebrochenem Strahl und Lot im Medium 2 (wird berechnet, falls unbekannt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre le rayon réfracté et la normale dans le milieu 2 (calculé si inconnu)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre el rayo refractado y la normal en el medio 2 (calculado si se desconoce)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين الشعاع المنكسر والعمودي في الوسط 2 (تحسب إذا كانت غير معروفة)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
